defect_observed: Solder joint thermal fatigue fracture
root_cause: deltaT=195C exceeded SAC305 spec; dT/dt 4.2 C/s on cooling — thermal shock
outcome: Field failure at 3 years 8 months — below 15yr AEC-Q100 target
recommended_action: Kill lot. Reflow profile cooling ramp must be reduced to <3 C/s. Validate with new Coffin-Manson run at corrected deltaT.
source: Pattern based on JEDEC JESD22-A104 thermal cycling reference profile

defect_observed: Die crack propagation from dicing chip
root_cause: 2.1mm edge chip exceeded Griffith critical length; crack grew to 2.8mm at reflow thermal shock
outcome: 100% lot failure at reflow step — $1,847 wasted per lot beyond checkpoint 1
recommended_action: Kill at checkpoint 1. Inspect dicing blade wear. Replace blade every 500 wafer passes.
source: JEDEC JESD22-B116 edge chip classification standard

defect_observed: Die attach void cluster causing thermal hotspot
physics_model: Thermal Resistance Estimator + Ideal Gas Law
root_cause: Clustered voids 31% area — thermal resistance Rth_eff 2.4x nominal. Junction temp exceeded safe limit by 18C.
outcome: Parametric drift failures at 2 years under hood thermal cycling
recommended_action: Kill lot. Void ratio >25% violates JEDEC threshold. Review die attach dispense pressure.
source: JEDEC JESD22-A113 voiding acceptance criteria

defect_observed: Wire bond IMC brittle fracture after thermal cycling
root_cause: Gold-aluminum IMC grew to 6.2 um after 1000 thermal cycles — exceeded 5um fracture threshold
outcome: Intermittent open circuit in field; 0.3% return rate over 18 months
recommended_action: Flag lot for accelerated IMC aging test. Consider copper wire alternative for high-temp applications.
source: IEEE TDMR Vol.18 gold-aluminum IMC growth kinetics study

defect_observed: Popcorn cracking at reflow — moisture-induced delamination
root_cause: Package exceeded MSL-2 floor life by 48 hours. Moisture content 0.18% wt — vapor pressure at 245C caused delamination.
outcome: Full lot rejection at functional test — 0% yield after reflow
recommended_action: Reject lot. Implement real-time floor life tracking in MES. Bake packages per J-STD-033 before reflow.
source: IPC/JEDEC J-STD-020 moisture sensitivity classification

defect_observed: Electromigration failure in Cu interconnect
root_cause: Current density J=2.1e6 A/cm2 exceeded Black's equation limit for 15yr automotive at 125C
outcome: Open circuit failures projected at 8.2 years — below 15yr target
recommended_action: Kill lot. Interconnect design requires wider traces for automotive current profile. Flag to layout team.
source: JEDEC JESD91 Black's equation parameter set for Cu interconnects

defect_observed: Corrosion of bond pad from humidity ingress
root_cause: Delamination at molding interface created moisture path to bond pads. RH=85% environment accelerated corrosion.
outcome: Leakage current failures after 14 months in coastal industrial environment
recommended_action: Kill lot. Delamination at mold interface is root cause — trace to molding step. Increase EMC adhesion primer.
source: JEDEC JESD22-A101 humidity resistance test standard

defect_observed: Weibull beta<1 infant mortality population
root_cause: beta=0.72 indicated latent defect population — likely die attach micro-voids not caught at CP2
outcome: Elevated field return rate in first 90 days (1.2% vs 0.05% baseline)
recommended_action: Flag batch. Extended 100% burn-in screening at 125C/168hr. Root cause CP2 void detection sensitivity.
source: JEDEC JESD47 stress-test-driven qualification reference

defect_observed: Wire sweep short circuit in dense BGA
root_cause: Fill velocity 18 cm/s caused wire deflection 14% pitch — above 10% short risk threshold
outcome: 5% lot short circuits detected at electrical test
recommended_action: Kill lot. Reduce EMC injection velocity to <12 cm/s. Wire sweep simulation must be run pre-production for wire pitch <100um.
source: JEDEC JESD22-B105 wire bond mechanical strength standard

defect_observed: Package warpage causing solder bridging
root_cause: CTE mismatch between substrate and EMC caused 210um bow — exceeds 150um JEDEC spec for 14x14mm package
outcome: 8% bridging rate at PCB assembly — customer returns
recommended_action: Kill lot. Review substrate CTE selection. Consider low-CTE copper-invar-copper substrate for large packages.
source: JEDEC JESD22-B112 package warpage measurement standard

defect_observed: Head-in-pillow solder joint defect
root_cause: Warpage during reflow caused die-side pads to lift 180um — solder solidified before wetting
outcome: Intermittent connection failures at vibration — 100% latent defects in corner balls
recommended_action: Kill lot. Head-in-pillow is a latent defect invisible to optical inspection. Warpage control is root cause.
source: IPC-7095C head-in-pillow defect characterisation

defect_observed: SPC drift 3.4 sigma in wire bond pull strength
root_cause: Cpk=1.1 — below 1.33 stable process threshold. Ultrasonic energy drifted up 12% over 4 hours.
outcome: Increased bond resistance leading to latent opens under thermal stress
recommended_action: Kill lot. Recalibrate bonder ultrasonic energy. Implement closed-loop bond force feedback. Do not ship until Cpk>1.33 re-verified.
source: JEDEC JESD22-B116 wire bond qualification standard

defect_observed: Cure shrinkage delamination at die-EMC interface
root_cause: EMC shrinkage 0.38% + high CTE mismatch generated 42 MPa residual stress — above adhesion strength 38 MPa
outcome: Delamination propagated during burn-in, exposing die surface to contamination
recommended_action: Kill lot. Switch to low-stress EMC grade. Cure ramp rate reduced to 2C/min to allow stress relaxation.
source: JEDEC JESD22-A113 non-destructive delamination evaluation

defect_observed: Dispersed voids (low ratio) — PASS, no action
root_cause: 18% void ratio, uniformly distributed — below 25% JEDEC threshold. Thermal resistance within spec.
outcome: No field failures. Lot shipped successfully. Used as reference for acceptable void pattern.
recommended_action: Pass. Document as reference for CV training on acceptable dispersed void patterns.
source: JEDEC JESD22-A113 reference profile for acceptable void distribution

defect_observed: Frequency-domain thermal resonance accelerating fatigue
root_cause: Dominant thermal frequency 2.3 Hz matched package mechanical resonance. Q-factor 8.2 — very high. Fatigue life reduced 6x.
outcome: Predicted Nf reduced from 2800 to 460 cycles — fails 15yr automotive requirement
recommended_action: Kill lot. Investigate underhood thermal management design. Add resonance detuning mass to PCB layout.
source: IEEE TDMR Vol.21 thermal cycling frequency effects on solder fatigue

defect_observed: Cosmetic mold flash — CV false positive
root_cause: CV flagged surface irregularities as functional voids. Human review confirmed cosmetic mold flash only.
outcome: False positive — lot was clean. CV retrained on mold flash examples.
recommended_action: Pass after human review. Cosmetic blemish does not affect reliability. Add to CV negative training examples.
source: Internal process review — cosmetic vs functional defect classification

defect_observed: Electromigration in narrow power rail
root_cause: Power rail width reduced 15% by lithography variation. J=1.9e6 A/cm2 at server TDP. MTTF=6.1yr < 7yr target.
outcome: Voltage droop failures at high CPU load after 5.8 years
recommended_action: Kill lot. Flag to layout team — power rail minimum width check missing in DRC. Add Black's equation check to sign-off flow.
source: JEDEC JESD91A electromigration test procedure

defect_observed: Scratch contamination misclassified as crack
root_cause: Deterministic classifier flagged 0.8mm linear mark. CV correctly identified as photoresist residue, not crack. Griffith analysis confirmed: residue depth 0.02mm — below propagation threshold.
outcome: True negative. CV disambiguation saved lot from false kill. Lot shipped with zero field failures.
recommended_action: Pass. Document photoresist residue signature for classifier improvement. Reduce false positive rate.
source: Internal false-positive reduction study — CP1 classifier calibration

defect_observed: Combined void + thermal fatigue failure mode interaction
root_cause: 22% void ratio (below JEDEC limit individually) combined with deltaT=185C elevated effective thermal stress by 1.2x interaction factor. Nf reduced 28%.
outcome: Failures at 11 years — below 15yr target. Interaction term detection critical.
recommended_action: Kill lot. Void ratio alone would have passed. Interaction term between void_thermal and solder_fatigue modes must be applied.
source: PackGuard interaction model — IEEE TDMR Vol.19 coupled failure mode study

defect_observed: Humidity-driven corrosion in coastal deployment
root_cause: RH=92% coastal environment. TTF Peck = 4.2yr — below 10yr industrial target. Package MSL-3 insufficient for deployment.
outcome: Corrosion failures within 3 years at coastal wind farm installation
recommended_action: Kill lot for coastal application. Specify conformal coating. Alternatively reclassify to indoor industrial use only.
source: JEDEC JESD22-A101 humidity bias life test — Peck model parameters

defect_observed: Weibull beta=1.8 wear-out population detected early
root_cause: beta=1.8 indicates wear-out mode starting within 4.2yr (eta). For 7yr server target this is critical.
outcome: Elevated failures in years 3-5 — within warranty period
recommended_action: Kill lot. Root cause investigation points to IMC growth at wire bonds. See KB-004 pattern.
source: JEDEC JESD47 Weibull beta classification — wear-out failure mode

defect_observed: Thermal shock at dT/dt=5.1 C/s exceeding spec
root_cause: Reflow oven zone 6 failed — temperature spike caused 5.1C/s cooling. JEDEC limit: 3C/s for SAC305.
outcome: Micro-cracking in solder balls — latent fatigue acceleration. Field failure at 6yr.
recommended_action: Kill lot. Oven calibration required. All lots post-oven-fault should be held pending 100% X-ray verification.
source: JEDEC J-STD-020 reflow profile requirements — dT/dt limits

defect_observed: Incomplete mold fill — EMC void in corner
physics_model: Wire Sweep Calculator + EMC void detection
root_cause: Mold injection gate position created air trap in corner. Void 2.8mm diameter adjacent to corner bond wire.
outcome: Moisture ingress at void caused corrosion failure within 18 months
recommended_action: Kill lot. Modify mold gate design. Add secondary vent gate at corner. Verify fill simulation before next run.
source: JEDEC JESD22-B110 package structural integrity standard

defect_observed: Solder bridge in fine-pitch BGA
root_cause: Package bow 185um caused corner balls to merge during reflow. Adjacent ball pitch 0.4mm.
outcome: 3.2% short circuit rate at final electrical test
recommended_action: Kill lot. Warpage mitigation: increase package corner stiffener. Review reflow fixture contact pressure.
source: IPC-7095C solder joint defect characterisation — bridging failure mode

defect_observed: Random beta=1.0 population — no action
root_cause: beta=0.98, effectively 1.0 — pure random failure mode. No systematic defect population present.
outcome: Lot shipped. Field failure rate matches random baseline. No elevated returns.
recommended_action: Pass. Random failure mode is expected. Lot meets consumer DPPM target.
source: JEDEC JESD47 Weibull classification — random failure mode definition

defect_observed: Delamination + corrosion interaction failure
root_cause: Delamination at mold-substrate interface (CP4) created moisture ingress path. Peck TTF in automotive environment: 7.2yr — below 15yr target.
outcome: Corrosion failures propagated through delamination channel. Field failures at 6.5yr.
recommended_action: Kill lot. Delamination-corrosion interaction term applied (1.40x multiplier). Root cause: cure shrinkage stress at CP4.
source: PackGuard interaction model KB-013 + KB-007 coupled failure documentation

defect_observed: Bond shear below minimum spec — process drift
root_cause: Cpk=1.05 — process drifting. Mean shear force 148mN vs 180mN nominal. Thermosonic bond temperature drifted 8C low.
outcome: Intermittent contact resistance increases. Field failures in vibration environment.
recommended_action: Kill lot. Recalibrate bond temperature controller. Monitor Cpk real-time — alert at Cpk<1.33.
source: JEDEC JESD22-B116 wire bond qualification — Cpk requirements

defect_observed: Solder void in critical ball (>50% single ball area)
root_cause: Single critical power ball has 58% void by area — exceeds JEDEC 50% single-ball threshold. High thermal resistance causes local hotspot.
outcome: Thermal runaway failure at full server load within 8 months
recommended_action: Kill lot. Single critical ball void >50% is immediate reject per JEDEC. Inspect stencil aperture over power balls.
source: JEDEC JESD22-B112 solder void acceptance criteria — critical ball definition

defect_observed: Predicted Nf just above spec minimum — flag decision
root_cause: Nf_predicted = 1,180 cycles, spec minimum 1,000 cycles at deltaT=190C. Margin only 18% — below target 30% margin.
outcome: Lot shipped with enhanced incoming inspection at customer. No failures in 4 years of field data.
recommended_action: Flag. Tight margin — add downstream X-ray 100% inspection. Recommend process improvement to increase Nf margin to >30%.
source: JEDEC JESD22-A104 thermal cycling test — Coffin-Manson Nf validation

defect_observed: Dust particle misidentified as die crack
root_cause: Deterministic classifier flagged 1.2mm linear feature. CV identified particle — inconsistent with crack morphology (edges too smooth, no stress field).
outcome: True negative. Lot passed after particle removal. CV saved false kill.
recommended_action: Pass after cleaning step. Particle contamination in dicing environment — review rinse station. Add particle morphology training to CV classifier.
source: Internal classification study — particle vs crack morphology signatures

defect_observed: IMC growth prediction — future failure mode
root_cause: Current IMC thickness 1.8um — within spec. But Arrhenius model predicts 5.4um at 15yr/125C continuous operation — above 5um fracture threshold.
outcome: Lot killed at CP3. Root cause: gold wire on aluminum pad — high IMC growth rate metallurgy mismatch.
recommended_action: Kill lot. Switch to copper wire for automotive application. Cu-Al IMC growth rate 40% lower than Au-Al.
source: IEEE TDMR IMC growth kinetics — Au-Al vs Cu-Al comparison study

defect_observed: Mold crack from handling damage
root_cause: Surface crack in mold from mechanical impact — not process-related. Located at package edge, not near die.
outcome: Flag — additional sampling 100%. 98% of lot clean. Crack confined to single tray handling damage.
recommended_action: Flag. Inspect all packages from affected tray. Improve tray insertion tooling to prevent edge impact.
source: Internal handling damage classification protocol

defect_observed: SPC rules 4+5 violation — systematic drift pattern
root_cause: 14 consecutive points alternating above/below mean (Rule 5). Indicates two populations mixed — two different die lots processed together.
outcome: Bimodal failure distribution. Systematic defect in 50% of lot.
recommended_action: Kill lot. Segregate by die lot source. Re-run SPC on each sub-population independently. Investigate mixed-lot processing.
source: Western Electric Statistical Quality Control Handbook — Rule 5 interpretation

defect_observed: Survival simulator predicts reflow failure from CP2 void
root_cause: 22% void (below 25% JEDEC limit alone). Survival simulator: at reflow 245C, gas expansion 74% ruptures void into delamination crack.
outcome: Lot killed at CP2 before physics-only threshold would have triggered. Survival simulator caught it.
recommended_action: Kill lot. 22% void passes static check but fails forward simulation. Survival simulator is essential for this failure mode.
source: PackGuard Survival Simulator — Ideal Gas Law reflow prediction module

defect_observed: Low confidence CV result — debate rule 1 consideration
root_cause: CV confidence 68% on void distribution classification. Thermal resistance model showed Rth_eff 1.8x nominal — within rule 1 threshold (P_fail 8%).
outcome: Debate rule 1 did NOT fire (P_fail <15%). Lot flagged for human review as borderline.
recommended_action: Flag. Human review required for borderline CV results with thermal resistance elevation. Document case for CV retraining.
source: PackGuard debate protocol rule 1 calibration — borderline case documentation
